scripts.test: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "[Console]::InputEncoding = [System.Text.UTF8Encoding]::new(); [Console]::OutputEncoding = [System.Text.UTF8Encoding]::new(); $OutputEncoding = [System.Text.UTF8Encoding]::new(); chcp 65001 > $null; npx playwright test"
